ddls:
CREATE TABLE "births" (
  "birth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth */,
  "weight_pounds" REAL /* Weight of the newborn in pounds */,
  "is_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the newborn is male (True) or female (False) */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother of the newborn */,
  "plurality" INTEGER /* Number indicating if the birth is singleton (1) or multiple (e.g., twins) */,
  "gestation_weeks" INTEGER /* Gestation period in weeks */,
  "hashmonth" TEXT /* Hash value representing the month of birth for analytics */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The date of birth */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the hospital where the birth occurred */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the doctor who delivered the baby */,
  "child_length_inches" REAL /* The length of the newborn in inches */,
  "apgar_score_1min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 1 minute */,
  "apgar_score_5min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 5 minutes */,
  "birth_order" INTEGER /* The order of the birth (e.g., first, second, etc.) */,
  "preterm_birth" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the birth was preterm */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* The method of delivery (e.g., vaginal, cesarean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_births_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mothers" (
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mother */,
  "mother_age" TEXT /* Age of the mother at the time of birth */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the mother (ethnicity, education, etc.) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the mother */,
  "mother_birth_date" TEXT /* The birth date of the mother */,
  "mother_marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status of the mother */,
  "mother_education_level" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the mother */,
  "mother_employment_status" TEXT /* The employment status of the mother */,
  "mother_smoking_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the mother smokes */,
  "mother_drinking_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the mother drinks alcohol */,
  "mother_bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the mother */,
  "mother_chronic_conditions" TEXT /* Any chronic conditions the mother has (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pregnancies" (
  "pregnancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother of the pregnancy */,
  "pregnancy_order" INTEGER /* Order of the pregnancy (e.g., first, second, etc.) */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Details of any complications during the pregnancy */,
  "pregnancy_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the pregnancy was confirmed */,
  "pregnancy_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the pregnancy ended (either by birth or other means) */,
  "pregnancy_outcome" TEXT /* The outcome of the pregnancy (e.g., live birth, stillbirth, miscarriage) */,
  "pregnancy_bmi" REAL /* The BMI of the mother at the start of the pregnancy */,
  "pregnancy_weight_gain" REAL /* The weight gain of the mother during the pregnancy */,
  "pregnancy_complications_severity" TEXT /* The severity of any complications during the pregnancy */,
  "pregnancy_prenatal_care" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the mother received prenatal care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pregnancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pregnancies_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother associated with the record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child associated with the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record entry */,
  "health_concerns" TEXT /* Details of health concerns noted in the record */,
  "health_provider_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the healthcare provider who recorded the health concerns */,
  "health_record_type" TEXT /* The type of health record (e.g., physical examination, lab results) */,
  "health_record_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the health record */,
  "health_record_status" TEXT /* The status of the health record (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES births ("birth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., average birth weight) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* The period over which the analysis was conducted (e.g., 2023-01-01 to 2023-01-31) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_sample_size" INTEGER /* The sample size used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval for the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, healthcare provider) */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The last login date of the user */,
  "user_active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* The location from which the access was made (e.g., city, country) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
